name: Quick Corn Sticks
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:10
1. Combine the first five ingredients and mix well.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
3. Place a well-greased cast-iron cornstick pan in a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven for 3 minutes or until hot.
4. Remove the pan from the oven and spoon the batter into the pan, filling it two-thirds full.
5. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Yield: Approximately 1-1/2 dozen.
QUICK CORN MUFFINS:
Season muffin pans as you would for corn sticks.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling them two-thirds full.
Bake at 425°F (220°C) for about 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Makes approximately 15 muffins.
NOTES: Serve these quick corn sticks alongside homemade soups and traditional Southern dinners.
